---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new preset, codec, filter, or fabulous visual theme for TransCoda
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🦄 Is your feature request related to a problem?

Please describe the problem or limitation you are facing. (e.g. "I want to convert files specifically for my old iPod Classic, but there is no preset for it").

## 💅 The Pitch

Describe the solution you want and why it fits the fabulous and lightweight philosophy of TransCoda.

## 🌈 Proposed Design / Theme / Codec Details

Describe how you envision the feature working:
* **UI/UX changes**: (Will it need a new toggle, preset list entry, or custom Drag Mode colors?)
* **Transcoding parameters**: (What FFmpeg codec arguments or filters would this feature use?)

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or ideas here.
